nasb.text: The Almighty—we cannot find Him; He is exalted in power And He will not do violence to justice and abundant righteousness.

esv.text: The Almighty—we cannot find him; he is great in power; justice and abundant righteousness he will not violate.

cnv.text: 論到全能者，我們無法把他查出； 他大有能力與公平， 又滿有公義，他必不苦待人。

ccb.text: 我们无法测度全能者， 祂充满能力，无比正直公义， 不恃强凌弱。
